hero.title: Welcome to The Tribe Guardians
hero.subtitle: A healing journey in Israel and abroad with Amazonian medicine

intro.paragraph: Before the initial acquaintance process, please find below the initial registration forms. We would appreciate if you fill them out from your computer at your leisure, and we recommend setting aside about half an hour to complete them. The information in the forms is personal and confidential – filling them out does not constitute any commitment.

notice.title: Please note:
notice.text: Most of the detailed information about the journey will be sent to you after we complete the initial screening stage, in a personal process. After completing the forms – The Tribe Guardians team will contact you to continue the personal process and provide additional information.

formSelection.title: Choose which form you would like to continue with:
formSelection.patientForm: Registration form for those interested in participating in the retreat
formSelection.healerForm: Registration form for therapists interested in joining the retreat team

login.title: Admin Sign In
login.description: Enter an allowlisted email to receive a secure magic link.
login.success: A sign-in link was sent to your email.
login.errorGeneric: Unable to send magic link. Please try again.
login.callbackError: Authentication failed. Request a new magic link.
login.forbiddenNotice: This account is signed in but not allowlisted for admin access.

queue.title: Submissions Queue
queue.description: Review and manage healer and patient submissions.
queue.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone
queue.name: Name

errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You are signed in but not authorized for admin access.
